Berserker Strength  

Description

1: Increase STR by 10 (L19) to 35 (L31)
2: Increase Absorb Damage by 20 (L19) to 85 (L130)
3: Decrease AGI by 1 (L19) to 16 (L29)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 45 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 8
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your muscles bulge with berserker strength.
Cast on other: Soandso 's muscles bulge with berserker strength.
Effect Fades: You feel your agility return.

Game Description

Hardens your skin and fills your arms with energy, increasing strength and absorbing damage, while also decreasing your agility.

Items with this effect

  • Braided Beard of the Coldain
  • Darkore Shortblade
  • Polished Granite Tomahawk
  • Shadow Rager
  • Spell: Berserker Strength
  • Spell: Berserker Strength

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Berserker Strength
Spell: Berserker Strength
ClassLevel
ENC19
Expansion:

Duration:
1.9 mins @L19 to 3.0 mins @L30
  • Comments (13)
  • Scroll 1 Sold By (1)
  • Scroll 1 Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots
Add Image

Merchants:


The Plane of Knowledge
  • Illusionist Jerup - 1pp 3gp 6sp

Beserker Strength New Recipe

# Feb 12 2008 at 5:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592265373580
14 posts
On EQ Traders it says the recipe is as follows:

Ink Additive Of The Nameless
Ink Of Pain
Ink Of The Cat
Ink Of The Rhino
Invigorating Thickener
Pristine Hide
Quill Of The Coercer

Combine in a spell research kit.

Trivial: (60)

Tried it and it does work

#iganias, Posted: May 01 2004 at 9:53 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) you research it you fuc kin dumb truck
agility up or down here?
QuoteReply
# Dec 15 2003 at 2:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794449537
20 posts
is the wording correct here "Decrease AGI by 11 (L20) to 15 (L28)" wont this cause your armor class to go down?
this is from eq stratics site where they say increase agility.

Berserker Strength - When you cast this spell on a warrior, you turn him or her into a virtual killing machine. The effects of this spell not only make the warrior stronger, but also increase his or her agility in combat and increases maximum hit points.

anyone?
▲ Page top
RE: agility up or down here?
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2003 at 6:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790904659
Scholar
18 posts
It is correct. It decreases AGI. It raises STR and gives Absorb Damage but lowers AGI.
▲ Page top
RE: agility up or down here?
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2004 at 5:16 PM Rating: Good
Kyrros
Sage
164 posts
Its more of a poor man's "Berserk", where they do more reckless damage at the expense of getting hit more. While they do get hit more, their 'frenzy' prevents them from feeling some of the pain (hence the damage absorption...)

A create "Mindless Killing Machine" spell... of sorts...

(I also believe this spell is research only... unless thats changed with the new Berserker class being able to use this as well...)

Edited, Tue Feb 17 17:19:08 2004
